text.title: Brand Voice Consistency System Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Brand Voice Consistency System.

example.scenario: Solo founder consolidating voice across blog, Twitter, LinkedIn, email.
example.trace: sample 25 posts → attributes=[direct, dry-humored, evidence-led, opinionated, brief] → 10 pairs → 4 channels (twitter, blog, linkedin, email) → drift audit baseline
